channel.title: Abouts on Scott's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Abouts on Scott's Blog

item.title: Travel
item.description: 09.2022 Summer Palace 08.2022 Mount Tai 08.2022 Ji Nan 08.2022 Temple of Heaven 08.2022 Beijing 07.2022 Weishan 05.2022 Beijing World Park 11.2021 Beijing

item.title: About Me
item.description: 04.2022 这个月的最后一个工作日，也是我在这家公司的最后一天。 12.2020 Faceing the reality, I have to start my new job again. 01.2020 Because of the COVID-19, the company is closed. Because everyone is not allowed to go out, I can’t find a new job. Then I decided to do a project with my friends. In this year, I learned Javaand VUE, we did a project. Then use docker to deploy in the Linux server. Although I didn’t get a dood income, but I learned a lot in this year.

item.title: About Me
item.description: Persönliche Daten && Kontact Journey 08.2022 五岳归来不看山，黄山归来不看岳 No mountain is more gorgeous than the Five Great Mountains until you pay a visit to Mount Huang. Mount Tai is belong to Five Great Mountains. I went climbing Mount Tai this month, it is more than 1500 miters high, at 23 o’clock I began to climb the mountain, it took me five hours to climb to the top.

item.title: About Me
item.description: Persönliche Daten && Kontact Time Line Written in Go, Hugo is an open source static site generator available under the Apache Licence 2.0. Hugo supports TOML, YAML and JSON data file types, Markdown and HTML content files and uses shortcodes to add rich content. Other notable features are taxonomies, multilingual mode, image processing, custom output formats, HTML/CSS/JS minification and support for Sass SCSS workflows. Hugo makes use of a variety of open source projects including:

item.title: Contact
item.description: Persönliche Daten Name: Scott Tao (Baitong Tao) Beruf: iOS Developer Abschluss: Bacher (Informatik) Wohnort: Beijing, China Heimat: Shandong, China Kontact Email ① Scott.Tao@88.com ② beyond521t@gmail.com
